tasks.label: Run active C++ file
tasks.command: mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/build" && /usr/bin/clang++ "${file}" -std=c++17 -fcolor-diagnostics -fansi-escape-codes -g -o "${workspaceFolder}/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}" && "${workspaceFolder}/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; status=$?; echo "[task exited with code $status]"; exec /bin/zsh -l
tasks.detail: Build and run active C++ file in build/

tasks.label: C/C++: clang++ build active file
tasks.command: /usr/bin/clang++ -fcolor-diagnostics -fansi-escape-codes -g "${file}" -o "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; status=$?; echo "[task exited with code $status]"; exec /bin/zsh -l
